prompt: You are hired to redesign the entire internet for the year 2050. Describe the architecture, protocols, security model, and migration strategy from today's internet.
Build a complete execution plan for launching a reusable orbital launch vehicle company with a budget of $10 billion.
You are reviewing a pull request containing 25,000 lines of code. Explain your systematic review process before approving it.
Design a compiler optimization pipeline that balances compilation speed with runtime performance.
Explain how you would implement snapshot isolation inside a distributed SQL database.
Design a peer-to-peer decentralized social media platform that can operate without centralized servers.
You are tasked with reducing inference latency of a 600B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model by 50%. Describe your optimization roadmap.
Explain how you would build an AI agent capable of autonomously fixing software bugs across multiple repositories.
You inherit an abandoned open-source project with thousands of unresolved issues. Describe how you would revive the community and project.
Design an autonomous quality assurance system capable of discovering software bugs without human-written tests.
You have access to email, Slack, GitHub, Jira, Google Calendar, and a browser. Describe how you would autonomously prepare a daily executive briefing.
Design an AI scientist capable of proposing hypotheses, planning experiments, interpreting results, and refining future experiments.
Plan the deployment of thousands of autonomous delivery drones across a major metropolitan city while minimizing safety risks.
Explain how an autonomous AI should recover after repeatedly failing to complete a long multi-step objective.
Design an AI project manager that coordinates multiple specialized AI agents working on the same software project.
You are responsible for autonomously migrating a company from one cloud provider to another with minimal downtime. Describe every stage.
Explain how an AI assistant should prioritize dozens of competing user requests with conflicting deadlines.
Create a workflow where an AI automatically investigates production incidents using logs, metrics, traces, and source code.
Design an anti-cheat system for a competitive online game that minimizes false positives.
Describe how you would detect coordinated bot networks operating across multiple social media platforms.
Explain how to build a secure voting system for national elections using modern cryptographic techniques.
Perform a security review of a password reset workflow and identify potential attack vectors.
Design a secure identity management platform for an international enterprise with millions of employees.
Explain how you would investigate a suspicious cryptocurrency exchange hack involving hundreds of millions of dollars.
Design a distributed scheduler for running millions of machine learning jobs across thousands of GPUs.
Explain how gradient checkpointing, activation recomputation, and offloading reduce GPU memory usage.
Compare modern sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures with dense transformer architectures from both training and inference perspectives.
Describe how you would evaluate whether a new LLM benchmark genuinely measures reasoning instead of memorization.
Explain how reinforcement learning could be used to improve autonomous software engineering agents.
Design a continual learning pipeline allowing an AI model to improve without catastrophic forgetting.
You are appointed Chief Risk Officer of a multinational bank during a global financial crisis. Outline your first ninety days.
Develop a recovery strategy for rebuilding communications after a massive solar storm disables satellites worldwide.
Design a long-term urban planning strategy for a coastal city threatened by rising sea levels.
Suppose a new energy source provides virtually unlimited electricity. Predict its impact across every major industry.
Explain how governments could coordinate internationally to regulate highly capable artificial intelligence systems.
Review a proposal claiming to achieve room-temperature quantum computing. Explain the evidence you would require before believing it.
Design an experiment to determine whether an AI system has developed genuinely novel scientific reasoning abilities.
Explain how you would organize a global collaboration to search for extraterrestrial microbial life within the Solar System.
Create a research roadmap toward building artificial general intelligence while minimizing existential risks.
Roleplay as the Chief Technology Officer presenting a five-year technology vision to the company's board of directors.
Pretend you are leading the first diplomatic negotiations between humans and a fully autonomous AI civilization.
Act as a military strategist defending a country entirely through cyber capabilities rather than conventional weapons.
Roleplay as the director of a global pandemic response task force making decisions under extreme uncertainty.
Pretend you are an AI alignment researcher explaining your work to world leaders who have no technical background.
Imagine humanity has achieved faster-than-light communication but not faster-than-light travel. Analyze the consequences for civilization.
Design an educational system optimized for the year 2100 assuming AI tutors are universally available.
Explain how you would rebuild the global semiconductor supply chain after a catastrophic disruption.
Design a complete roadmap for transitioning an entire country's transportation infrastructure to autonomous electric vehicles.
Imagine you are responsible for preserving all human knowledge for one million years. Describe your strategy.
Develop a comprehensive plan for creating a self-sustaining underwater city capable of supporting 100,000 residents.
You are appointed governor of the first permanent lunar colony. Draft your priorities, policies, and long-term development strategy.
